description_long: This is a modern, multi-story residential house with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The exterior is finished in a light, neutral color palette, complemented by horizontal wooden slat railings on the balconies and perimeter fencing. Large windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The house features multiple balconies and terraces, some with pergola-style coverings, and landscaped garden areas with palm trees and low shrubbery. The main entrance is set back from the street, accessible via a paved walkway flanked by greenery. The overall design emphasizes open outdoor spaces and a contemporary urban aesthetic.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large windows, wooden balcony railings, and landscaped gardens. The design features clean lines, multiple terraces, and a light exterior finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped garden, palm trees, and prominent balconies with wooden railings.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the plain wall with minimal windows and a large balcony with greenery.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid wall, few windows, and a fenced garden area.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing additional balconies, a pergola, and more landscaped greenery.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main entry with a paved walkway, surrounded by landscaped greenery and a simple, modern door.
